industry: Hotel resort / family staycation · San Mateo Rizal

system.label: Booking & calendar admin
system.painHero: Stop taking family and friends bookings only on Messenger — see which dates are open and confirm guests from one calendar.

quotation.packageScope: One-page responsive website only (amenities, gallery, about, FAQ, contact). Admin preview is a sample; production booking system priced separately.
quotation.paymentTerms: 50% upfront to begin · 50% on delivery (not the full amount upfront)

outreach.notes: Email from FB Intro: lizpalmanaresort@yahoo.com. No phone on public About. Existing site lizpalmana.com noted (403 on fetch). Ask before send.

sources.address: Baltazar Compound, Patiis Rd, Malanday, San Mateo, Philippines
sources.tagline: An ideal place for your family and friends.
sources.notes: HD assets from Facebook Photos — hero-venue 1080×810, logo 942×941, pool/gallery up to 1080². Parallel-agent FB tab collisions; assets via in-page fetch + base64.
